stories.body: After mounting political pressure, the UK prime minister has announced his departure, throwing British politics into fresh uncertainty and setting off a succession scramble — even as Trump bizarrely predicted the resignation days earlier, stunning observers when
stories.link_text: Keir Starmer resigns as Prime Minister.
